sentence: El rapaz cueye la fueya del carbayu.
ipa: el rapaz̻ kweʝe la fweʝa del kaɾbaʝu
gloss_en: The boy picks the leaf of the oak.
notes: Tonic Ŏ>/ue/ 'cueye','fueya', -LJ->[ʝ] and final -u 'carbayu' per morala_egido2009; the Leonese sibilant system realises coda ⟨z⟩ as an apico-alveolar (here [z̻]) not Castilian [θ] per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: La ñeve cubrió tol prau de Babia.
ipa: la ɲebe kubɾiɔ tol pɾaw de baβja
gloss_en: The snow covered the whole meadow of Babia.
notes: Word-initial N->[ɲ] 'ñeve' per morala_egido2009; falling diphthong 'prau' and betacism 'ñeve' [b] per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: El gatu ñeru duerme cabu del llume.
ipa: el ɡatu ɲeɾu dweɾme kaβu del ʎume
gloss_en: The cat sleeps by the fire.
notes: Word-initial N->[ɲ] 'ñeru' and L->[ʎ] 'llume' per morala_egido2009; tonic Ŏ>/ue/ 'duerme' and final -u per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: ¿Cuántos años tien to buelu?
ipa: kuantos̺ aɲos̺ tjen to bwelu
gloss_en: How many years does your grandfather have?
notes: ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ] 'años' and diphthong 'tien' per morala_egido2009; final -u 'buelu' (< abuelo) per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: ¡Baxa y pieslla la portiella!
ipa: baʃa ʝ pjes̺ʎa la poɾtjeʎa
gloss_en: Come down and shut the little gate!
notes: -LL->[ʎ] 'pieslla','portiella' and tonic Ĕ>/ie/ per morala_egido2009; ⟨x⟩ [ʃ] 'Baxa' per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: La muyer merca fariña na plaza.
ipa: la muʝeɾ meɾka faɾiɲa na plad͡za
gloss_en: The woman buys flour in the square.
notes: -LJ->[ʝ] 'muyer' and ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ] 'fariña' per morala_egido2009; the Leonese sibilant system realises ⟨z⟩ as an affricate [d͡z] here, not Castilian [θ] per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: Tres vacas pacen na braña.
ipa: tɾes̺ bakas̺ pat͡sen na bɾaɲa
gloss_en: Three cows graze on the high pasture.
notes: ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ] 'braña' per morala_egido2009; ⟨c⟩ before front vowel realised as the Leonese affricate [t͡s] (medieval sibilant reflex) not [θ] per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: El molineiru moliú el centenu.
ipa: el molinejɾu moliu el t͡sentenu
gloss_en: The miller ground the rye.
notes: Western ⟨ei⟩ 'molineiru' and final -u 'centenu' per morala_egido2009; ⟨c⟩ realised as affricate [t͡s] per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: Llovía muitu na Cabreira.
ipa: ʎobia mwitu na kabɾejɾa
gloss_en: It rained a lot in Cabreira.
notes: Word-initial L->[ʎ] 'Llovía', -CT->/it/ 'muitu' and western ⟨ei⟩ 'Cabreira' per morala_egido2009; final -u per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: La fonte cuerre cerca del teixu.
ipa: la fonte kwere t͡seɾka del tejʃu
gloss_en: The spring runs near the yew.
notes: Tonic Ŏ>/ue/ 'cuerre' and western ⟨ei⟩ 'teixu' per morala_egido2009; ⟨c⟩ affricate [t͡s] 'cerca', trill [r] and final -u per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: El perru lladra tola nueite.
ipa: el peru ʎadɾa tola nweite
gloss_en: The dog barks all night.
notes: Word-initial L->[ʎ] 'lladra' and -CT->/it/ 'nueite' per morala_egido2009; trill [r] 'perru' and final -u per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: Comimos queisu con pan de centenu.
ipa: komimos̺ kejz̺u kon pan de t͡sentenu
gloss_en: We ate cheese with rye bread.
notes: Western ⟨ei⟩ 'queisu' and final -u per morala_egido2009; intervocalic ⟨s⟩ voiced [z̺] and ⟨c⟩ affricate [t͡s] — the Leonese sibilant system — per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: El ferreiru fizo una reya.
ipa: el ferejɾu fid͡zo una reʝa
gloss_en: The blacksmith made a plough-blade.
notes: Western ⟨ei⟩ 'ferreiru', -LJ->[ʝ] 'reya' and final -u per morala_egido2009; ⟨z⟩ voiced affricate [d͡z] 'fizo' and trill [r] per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: ¿Ónde ta el caminu pa la ilesia?
ipa: ɔnde ta el kaminu pa la ilez̺ja
gloss_en: Where is the way to the church?
notes: Final -u 'caminu' per morala_egido2009; intervocalic ⟨s⟩ voiced [z̺] 'ilesia' and simplified 'ilesia' per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: La lluz del sol rellumbra na peña.
ipa: la ʎuz̻ del s̺ol reʎumbɾa na peɲa
gloss_en: The sunlight shines over the crag.
notes: Word-initial and -LL->[ʎ] 'lluz','rellumbra', ⟨ñ⟩ [ɲ] 'peña' per morala_egido2009; coda ⟨z⟩ apico [z̻] and trill [r] per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: El rapaz ruempe la rama del ñozal.
ipa: el rapaz̻ rwempe la rama del ɲod͡zal
gloss_en: The boy breaks the branch of the walnut tree.
notes: Word-initial N->[ɲ] 'ñozal' and tonic Ŏ>/ue/ 'ruempe' per morala_egido2009; coda ⟨z⟩ [z̻], ⟨z⟩ affricate [d͡z] 'ñozal' and trill [r] per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: Falóu con Xuan na romería.
ipa: falɔu kon ʃwan na romeɾia
gloss_en: He talked with Xuan at the pilgrimage.
notes: Western ⟨ou⟩ 'Falóu', F- retention and ⟨x⟩ [ʃ] 'Xuan' per morala_egido2009; trill [r] 'romería' per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: Diez ovejas baxan pol monte.
ipa: djez̻ obeʒas̺ baʃan pol monte
gloss_en: Ten sheep go down the hillside.
notes: Diphthong 'Diez' [dje-] and ⟨x⟩ [ʃ] 'baxan' per morala_egido2009; ⟨j⟩ voiced [ʒ] 'ovejas' and coda ⟨z⟩ [z̻] 'Diez' — the Leonese voiced-sibilant reflex — per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: La muyer coyó fabes nel güertu.
ipa: la muʝeɾ koʝɔ faβes̺ nel ɡweɾtu
gloss_en: The woman picked beans in the garden.
notes: -LJ->[ʝ] 'muyer','coyó' and final -u 'güertu' per morala_egido2009; intervocalic ⟨s⟩ voiced [z̺] 'fabes' per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: Nun quiero más pan nin queisu.
ipa: nun kjeɾo mas̺ pan nin kejz̺u
gloss_en: I don't want more bread or cheese.
notes: Negator 'nun'/'nin' and diphthong 'quiero' per morala_egido2009; western ⟨ei⟩ 'queisu', final -u and intervocalic voiced ⟨s⟩ [z̺] per garcia_arias2003.
